Home›All services›Microsoft 365 Setup
✦

Work together with less friction

Microsoft 365 Setup

Configure Microsoft 365 email, files, calendars, and security around the way your team actually works.

Ask about this service →

What this service solves

A practical setup your team can use with confidence.

A thoughtful Microsoft 365 setup makes communication simpler and protects business information. We organize users, shared mailboxes, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint, permissions, and essential security without overcomplicating the environment.

✉Questions before you begin?support@steadydeskit.com

What is included

Focused support, clearly scoped.

  • ✓Tenant and domain configuration
  • ✓User, alias, and shared mailbox setup
  • ✓Teams and shared file structure
  • ✓OneDrive and SharePoint permissions
  • ✓Multi-factor authentication
  • ✓Migration planning and staff guidance

Business outcomes

What improves for your team.

✓

Professional company email

✓

Clear access to shared information

✓

Safer sign-ins

✓

A setup employees can understand

Built around real roles

A Microsoft 365 environment shaped around how your team actually works.

Licenses alone do not create an organized workspace. We translate departments, responsibilities, shared information, and approval needs into a setup that employees can understand and an owner can continue to manage.

Mailboxes and business identity

We connect the domain, establish user and shared mailboxes, review aliases, and plan a cutover that reduces missed messages.

Shared work with clear ownership

Teams, SharePoint, and OneDrive locations are organized so staff know where a working file belongs and who controls access.

Safer administration

We establish multi-factor authentication, sensible admin roles, recovery contacts, and documented ownership instead of relying on one all-powerful login.

Before launch

Decisions we make before users are moved.

A reliable Microsoft 365 setup begins with business decisions, not a rushed migration. We identify what must stay, what can be cleaned up, and how employees will find their work on day one.

Tenant and domain ownership

We verify who owns the tenant, domain, billing relationship, and recovery channels before important records are moved.

Identity and licensing map

Each employee, contractor, shared address, and administrator is matched to the access and license they genuinely require.

Information structure

Personal work, shared team files, and controlled company records receive distinct locations and ownership rules.

Migration and recovery plan

We document source data, timing, validation checks, rollback options, and who confirms that mail and files arrived correctly.

How the work moves forward

Three clear stages, with no mystery in the middle.

✓

Plan the workspace

We map users, email addresses, shared files, and collaboration needs.

✓

Configure and migrate

Accounts, security, mail, calendars, and files are prepared carefully.

✓

Launch with guidance

We test access and show employees the daily actions they need.

A good fit for

Support designed around real small-business conditions.

  • ✓Businesses moving from personal email
  • ✓Teams replacing an inconsistent setup
  • ✓Companies adding Microsoft Teams or SharePoint
Discuss your situation →

Common questions

Can you migrate our existing email?+

Yes. We first review the current provider, mailbox sizes, aliases, calendars, and timing, then create a migration plan designed to limit disruption.

Will employees need training?+

We provide short, role-relevant guidance so people know how to sign in, find shared files, use email safely, and ask for help.

Planning Microsoft 365?

Set up the workspace with fewer surprises.

Describe your current email and file setup, team size, domain, and desired result. We will help define a sensible migration or configuration starting point.

Contact our team The secure contact form opens on the Contact page.
